Navbar.ugModulesDesc: Jonga zonke iimodyuli ze-CS ze-undergraduate ngonyaka.
Navbar.ugGuideDesc: Ulwakhiwo lwedigri, iindawo eziphambili, kunye nembono yekharityhulam.
Navbar.ugProspectiveDesc: Ukwamkelwa, iimfuno, kunye nendlela yokufaka isicelo.
Navbar.pgModulesDesc: Ikhathalogu yeemodyuli ze-Honours, Masters, kunye ne-PhD.

Hero.description: Ngaphezulu kweminyaka engama-50, iSebe leNzululwazi yeKhompyutha yaseStellenbosch ibikwindawo ephambili ezintsha — iphuhlisa uphando kwaye iphuhlisa iinkokeli eziqhuba itekhnoloji kunye nokufumanisa kwihlabathi liphela.

Features.title: Kutheni i-CS yaseStellenbosch?
Features.subtitle: Fumanisa ukuba yintoni eyenza isebe lethu libe likhokelo kwimfundo ye-computer science kunye nophando.
Features.worldClassDescription: Iidigri ze-undergraduate kunye ne-postgraduate ezilungiselelwe ukuvelisa abafundi abakulungele ishishini.
Features.researchDescription: Amaqela ophando asebenzayo kwi-AI, ukufunda koomatshini, inzululwazi yedatha, kunye nokhuseleko lwedijithali.
Features.communityDescription: Indawo yokusebenzisana edibanisa abafundi, ootitshala, kunye namaqabane oshishino.
Features.globalDescription: Abafundi bethu abaphumelele basebenza kwiinkampani eziphambili zetekhnoloji nakumaziko ophando kwihlabathi liphela.
Features.facultyDescription: Funda kubaphandi abaziwa ngamazwe ngamazwe kunye nootitshala abanamava.
Features.handsOnDescription: Iikharityhulam ezisekelwe kwiiprojekthi ezilungiselela imingeni yokwenyani ye-software engineering.

Programmes.title: Iinkqubo zethu
Programmes.subtitle: Ukusuka kwiziseko ze-undergraduate ukuya kuphando lwe-postgraduate, fumana indlela efanelekileyo yekamva lakho.
Programmes.bscDescription: Idigri ye-undergraduate yeminyaka emithathu enika isiseko esiluqilima kwiialgorithm, iinkqubo, kunye ne-software engineering.
Programmes.honsDescription: Unyaka we-honours onzulu onemisebenzi ephambili kunye neprojekthi yophando kwindawo ekhethekileyo.
Programmes.mscDescription: Iinkqubo zophando lwe-postgraduate ezilawulwa ziingcali ezikhokelayo kwiindawo ezahlukeneyo.

Contact.title: Qhagamshelana nathi
Contact.description: Unemibuzo malunga neenkqubo zethu, uphando, okanye nantoni na? Singathanda ukuva kuwe.

UgModules.title: Iimodyuli ze-Undergraduate
UgModules.subtitle: Zonke iimodyuli ze-Computer Science ezinikelwa kulo lonke inkqubo ye-undergraduate, zihlelwe ngonyaka.

UgGuide.title: Isikhokelo senkqubo
UgGuide.subtitle: Yonke into ekufuneka uyazi malunga nokufunda i-Computer Science eYunivesithi yaseStellenbosch.
UgGuide.overviewText: I-BSc Computer Science lolona khetho lwabafundi abafuna ukusebenza kwi-software development. Olu qinisekiso lwamazwe ngamazwe lukuvumela ukuba usebenze kwiinkampani zasekhaya nezamazwe ngamazwe.
UgGuide.focalAreasSubtitle: Khetha ubuchule obuhambelana nomdla wakho kunye neenjongo zomsebenzi.
UgGuide.generalCSDesc: I-CS enkulu ebanzi edityaniswe nokhetho lweemodyuli zeNzululwazi.
UgGuide.computerSystemsDesc: I-CS enkulu edityaniswe neemodyuli zoMbane kunye ne-Electronic Engineering.
UgGuide.dataScienceDesc: I-CS enkulu edityaniswe ne-Statistics kunye neData Science.
UgGuide.geneticsDesc: I-Computer Science kunye neGenetics njengesibini esikhulu.
UgGuide.geoInfoDesc: I-Computer Science kunye ne-GIT njengesibini esikhulu.
UgGuide.curriculumText: Ikharityhulam engundoqo ye-CS ibandakanya: CS 114, 144, 214, 244, 343, 344, kunye nobuncinane ezimbini kwezi: 314/313/315.

UgProspective.title: Abafundi abaza kufunda i-Undergraduate
UgProspective.subtitle: Yonke into ekufuneka uyazi malunga nokufaka isicelo sokufunda i-Computer Science eYunivesithi yaseStellenbosch.
UgProspective.whatIsCSText: I-Computer Science yithiyori kunye nokuziqhelanisa nee-algorithm. Luhlanganiso oluhle lobugcisa, inzululwazi, kunye nobunjineli ukusombulula iingxaki ngeekhompyutha. Abafundi bethu bafunda ukwenza iinkqubo, ukuphuhlisa, kunye nokulawula iinkqubo ezinkulu ze-software — kodwa okona kubalulekileyo, ukufunda ukujonga iingxaki ngendlela yeenkqubo zokubala.
UgProspective.whyStellenboschAcademic: IYunivesithi yaseStellenbosch iphakathi kwezikolo eziphambili eMzantsi Afrika ngokwemveliso yophando, amanqanaba okuphumelela kwabafundi, kunye neengcali ezivunyiweyo.
UgProspective.whyStellenboschCommunity: Ukufunda eStellenbosch akusosifundo kuphela — yindlela yokuphila. Ukutya okukhulu kunye newayini, indalo entle, inkcubeko ephilayo, kunye nemisebenzi yokuzonwabisa konke kunegalelo kumava omfundi alungeleleneyo.
UgProspective.admissionsText: Ezona mfuno zisezantsi zokwamkelwa zikhankanywa kwikhalenda yeFakhalthi yeNzululwazi. Qaphela ukuba i-Computer Science idumile kwaye ukuhlangabezana neemfuno ezisezantsi akusiqinisekisi ukwamkelwa ngenxa yemfuno ephezulu kunye nendawo encinci.
UgProspective.afterGradText: Abaphumeleleyo bethu bafunwa ziinkampani kwihlabathi liphela. Iindlela zomsebenzi zibandakanya i-software engineering, inzululwazi yedatha, uphando lwe-AI, ukhuseleko lwedijithali, ukubonisana, nokunye.

PgModules.title: Iimodyuli ze-Postgraduate
PgModules.subtitle: Iimodyuli ezinikelwa kwiinkqubo ze-Honours, Masters, kunye ne-PhD kwi-Computer Science.

PgProspective.title: Abafundi abaza kufunda i-Postgraduate
PgProspective.subtitle: Iimfuno zokungena, iinkqubo zesicelo, kunye nayo yonke into ekufuneka uyazi malunga nokujoyina inkqubo yethu ye-postgraduate.
honoursReqs: Umyinge ongaphantsi kwe-65% kwiimodyuli ze-CS zonyaka wokugqibela
Ubuncinane bee-32 iikhredithi kwiimodyuli zequantitative kwinqanaba lesi-2/lesi-3
PgProspective.mastersReqs: Idigri ye-Honours kwi-Computer Science okanye elinganayo evunyiweyo. Imvelaphi eyongezelelweyo ingafuneka kwimeko nganye.
PgProspective.phdReqs: Idigri ye-Masters esekwe kwithisisi kunye nemvelaphi efunekayo ye-Computer Science.
howToApplySteps: Gqibezela iifomu zesicelo kwaye ulayishe amaxwebhu afunekayo
PgProspective.partTimeText: Ukufunda ngexesha elinxalenye kuyafumaneka. I-Honours ingathatha iminyaka emibini; i-Masters imithathu ukuya kwemine. Siyalamkela abafundi bamazwe ngamazwe — iimodyuli zethu zifundiswa ngesiNgesi kwaye zilingana nee-8 ECTS iikhredithi nganye.
PgProspective.fundingText: Iyunivesithi inikezela ngeebhasari ezahlukeneyo kunye nenkxaso-mali. Izikhundla zootitshala abancedisayo zinokubonelela ngengeniso eyongezelelweyo. Abanye abaphathi banezimali zophando ezifumanekayo kubafundi beMasters/PhD.

PgHonours.title: I-Honours kwi-Computer Science
PgHonours.subtitle: Inkqubo ye-postgraduate yonyaka omnye epheleleyo ephuhlisa izakhono zophando kunye nolwazi oluphambili lwe-CS.
PgHonours.overviewText: Kwiminyaka engama-45 idlulileyo, abafundi abangaphezu kwe-600 abanetalente badlule kule nkqubo yethu. Lululungiselelo olugqwesileyo lokuqhuba i-MSc okanye umsebenzi kwishishini.
PgHonours.projectText: Iprojekthi ye-honours ixabisa iikhredithi ezingama-32 — ulwakhiwo lwe-software enkulu okanye ingxaki yophando eyenziwa ngokuzimeleyo phantsi kolawulo lwabasebenzi unyaka wonke.
PgHonours.electivesText: Iimodyuli ezintandathu ozikhethayo ezingama-16 iikhredithi nganye. Khetha indibaniselwano egxile kuFundo loMatshini, Inzululwazi yeDatha, uYilo lweSoftware, okanye uluhlu olubanzi.
PgHonours.maxExternal: Ubuninzi beemodyuli ezimbini zingathathwa kumasebe anxulumene noko ngemvume.
highlights: Indibaniselwano eqinileyo yetiyori kunye neekhosi zesicelo
Iprojekthi yophando ezimeleyo phantsi kolawulo lwabasebenzi

PgMasters.title: I-Masters kwi-Computer Science
PgMasters.subtitle: Inkqubo yeminyaka emibini esekwe kwithisisi efundisa izakhono zophando zebanga lehlabathi.
PgMasters.overviewText: Injongo kukufundisa abafundi indlela yokuvavanya kunye nokuqhuba uphando lwebanga lehlabathi kwaye babe ngamagcisa kwicandelo labo. Nangona umsebenzi ungafuneki ukuba uphando olutsha oluphambili, rhoqo lunjalo.
PgMasters.structureText: Idigri yeMasters isekwe kumsebenzi wethisisi phantsi kolawulo lomphathi. Kufuneka ufumane imvumelwano lomalungu abasebenzi oza kulawula ithisisi yakho.
howToStartSteps: Khangela amaphepha ethu oPhando ukufumana imimandla onomdla kuyo
Qhagamshelana nomphathi onokubakho ukuze nixoxe ngezihloko
Fumana imvumelwano kumphathi ngaphambi kokufaka isicelo
Ukuba kunokwenzeka, hlela intlanganiso ebusweni ngobuso
PgMasters.careerText: Izakhono zokufunda, ukubhala, kunye nokucinga okunzulu ezifunyenweyo zifunwa kakhulu kwishishini. Uninzi lwabaphumeleleyo abangaqhubeki ne-PhD baya kwimisebenzi ephumelelayo apha nasephesheya.

PgPhd.title: I-PhD kwi-Computer Science
PgPhd.subtitle: Uphando lwe-Doctoral oluvelisa igalelo lokuqala kwicandelo le-Computer Science.
PgPhd.overviewText: Kufuneka kube nesisombululo esiqulathe iziphumo zophando lwakho oluzimeleyo. Inkqubo yethu ye-PhD inika ithuba lokusebenza kunye nabaphandi abaziwayo kwihlabathi kwiingxaki eziphambili.
PgPhd.requirementsText: Idigri yeMasters esekwe kwithisisi kunye nemvelaphi efunekayo ye-Computer Science. Ezinye iimfuno zinokumiselwa ngumphathi wakho.
PgPhd.researchText: Is部门 yethu inamaqela ophando asebenzayo asusela kwi-artificial intelligence, ukufunda koomatshini, inzululwazi yedatha, ukhuseleko lwedijithali, uyilo lwe-software, nokunye.
PgPhd.supervisorText: Khangela amaphepha ethu oPhando kwaye uqhagamshelane nabaphathi abanokubakho ukuze nixoxe ngezihloko zophando. Ukufumana imvumelwano yomphathi kubalulekile ngaphambi kokufaka isicelo.

Metadata.title: I-Computer Science - Yunivesithi yaseStellenbosch
Metadata.description: Iwebhusayithi yeSebe le-Computer Science eYunivesithi yaseStellenbosch. Jonga iinkqubo zethu, uphando, kunye noluntu.

Research.title: Uphando
Research.subtitle: Jonga amaqela ophando kunye nemimandla ephambili kwiSebe le-Computer Science eYunivesithi yaseStellenbosch.
Research.intro: Is部门 yethu likhaya lamaqela amaninzi ophando asebenzayo asusela kwi-computer science yetiyori, uyilo lwe-software, ukufunda koomatshini, kunye nonxibelelwano. Amalungu efakhalthi kunye nabafundi basebenzisana kwiingxaki eziphucula zombini ithiyori kunye nokuziqhelanisa nokubala.
Research.automataTitle: Ithiyori kunye noSetyenziso lwe-Automata kunye neeGrama
Research.automataDesc1: Sinomdla kwithiyori ye-nondeterministic finite automata (NFA), kwaye ngakumbi ubunzima bokuchaza be-symmetric difference NFA. Ngokubanzi, sikwajonga ukusetyenziswa kwe-automata kunye neegrama kwiingxaki ezahlukeneyo, ezifana nokuphuculwa kokubekwa kwemizobo nge-cellular automata, ukusetyenzwa kwemifanekiso nge-cellular automata, ukuveliswa komculo ngendlela yomqambi othile usebenzisa i-probabilistic automata, kunye nokusebenzisa i-probabilistic automata kwi-parse trees yesiNgesi ukulungisa ngokuzenzekelayo i-grammar yesiNgesi.
Research.automataDesc2: I-Automata kunye neegrama zineyona thiyori ityebileyo nephuhliswe kakuhle enokusetyenziswa, kodwa rhoqo ukuziqhelanisa kufuna ukuba ithiyori yandiswe ngeendlela ezintsha. Kumzekelo wokuphuculwa kokubekwa kwemizobo, i-cellular automata ene-cell clustering, oko kukuthi, i-cellular automata enotshintsho kwi-topology yommelwane ngokuhamba kwexesha, zachazwa kwaye zaboniswa ukuba zinegalelo elihle kwizicelo ezisebenzayo.
Research.automataLink1: Ithiyori kunye noSetyenziso lwe-Automata kunye neeGrama
Research.sevDesc: Iqela loYilo lweSoftware kunye nokuQinisekiswa eYunivesithi yaseStellenbosch belibandakanyeka kuphuhliso lweekernel zenkqubo yokusebenza, iiprotokholi, kunye nezixhobo zokuqinisekisa ukusukela ngo-1990. Siphanda uphuhliso lwenkqubo yesoftware ethembekileyo kakhulu sisebenzisa indibaniselwano yokuqinisekiswa kweenkqubo ngoncedo lweekhompyutha, uvavanyo olucwangcisiweyo, kunye neendlela zokubhala ezikhuselayo.
Research.mlaiDesc: Eli qela lijonga phantse naliphi na icandelo lengxaki yokwenza izigqibo ngokubanzi, kubandakanywa ukwenza izigqibo ngokulandelelana phantsi kokungaqinisekanga. Iingxaki eziphambili esizijongayo ziquka ucwangciso, ukufunda koomatshini, kunye ne-algorithms zokukhangela. Indlela yethu isekwe kwithiyori yamathuba kunye nethiyori yomdlalo yolawulo lokungaqinisekanga kunye neenkqubo ezininzi. Sikwaphanda indibaniselwano yokufunda koomatshini kunye nedatha enkulu, ngakumbi idatha evela kwiisensors zokujonga umhlaba kunye ne-radio interferometers.
Research.telkomDesc: IYunivesithi yaseStellenbosch yeSebe leTelkom-Siemens Centre of Excellence kwi-ATM kunye neBroadband Networks kunye noSetyenziso lwazo ijolise ekukhuthazeni uphando kunye nophuhliso kwitekhnoloji ye-broadband kunye noSetyenziso lwayo kunye nokuqeqesha abafundi be-postgraduate kunye neengcali kubuchule obufunekayo kweli candelo lonxibelelwano.
